refinement_sections.content: The logistics company wants to improve how they sort packages in their warehouse. Right now, they only look at one thing, which is not very efficient. I need to figure out how to sort packages better, but I don't know exactly what factors to consider.

The company has data on package dimensions, weight, and priority. I need to decide which of these factors are the most important for sorting. It might be good to sort by priority first, then by weight, and finally by dimensions, but I’m not sure.

The company wants to reduce the time packages are sorted, but they haven’t explained what that means. I should probably ask how they currently measure time in the sorting process. Is it the total time, average time, or something else?

I might have to make some guesses about how to weigh the different sorting criteria since the company hasn’t provided that. I could assume that priority is the most important, but I need to mention these assumptions in my report.

I should think about how my new sorting algorithm might work better than the old one. Maybe it will save time by grouping similar packages together or sorting them faster, but I need to figure out how to explain that in my report.
